'''Altyr V''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Altyr system/Legends|Altyr system]].

==History==
Seceding to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Altyr V was the site of a [[Battle of Altyr V|battle]] during which [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone commander]] [[Deviss/Legends|Deviss]] and his forces destroyed the Separatist [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] established on planet. With the cannon inactive the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] was able to rout the Separatist forces and reclaim Altyr V for the Republic.<ref name="Insider-84" />

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] rose to power, it took over control of the planet, placing it within [[Oversector Outer]]. As the Empire became more destabilized at the close of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] established a base on Altyr V. In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Kyle Katarn]] was stationed on the planet acting as [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] along with his temporary [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. During their stay, the [[Dark Empire]] began an [[Battle of Altyr V (Galactic Civil War)|assault]] on the planet. The Republic forces found out that the Remnant had manned two modified asteroids, which they used to bombard the planet, pinning the Republic forces down until a large-scale assault could be staged. Katarn managed to travel to one of the asteroids and redirect its weapon to the other asteroid, destroying it. He then circumvented the weapon's cooling system, destroying the one he was on, barely escaping himself. It was during this mission he learned of an Imperial presence on [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]], leading to his fateful brush with the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark side of the Force]].<ref name="MOS" />

Following the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Altyr V was granted representation in the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]]. During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], representatives from Altyr V condemned the actions of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]]s raids on [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] citizens on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="Bloodlines" /> and later joined the [[Confederation]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Altyr V was created for the expansion pack named ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''. It was later charted on a map of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in the ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.
